lifecycle.usageRule: Use TitanClusterGraph from titan-compositions for graph slot + node details dialog before custom graph wrappers.
lifecycle.migrationTrigger: Sync spec when TitanClusterGraph props, state behavior, or anatomy guidance changes.

cluster-graph.description: Force-directed clustered graph for exploring relationships between profiles/entities with detail-on-demand.

interaction.nodeSelect: Click node to open details dialog (when withDetailsDialog=true).
interaction.dialogClose: Close button or onOpenChange(false) resets selected node.

blockingRules: If you need a relationship graph in Titan, use TitanClusterGraph first.
Only build custom wrappers around TitanClusterGraph when domain-specific controls or data transforms require it.
